announcements.title: What's new in 2.0.0
announcements.message: Borg UI 2.0.0 adds built-in plans, Borg 2 support, better access control, and a more polished day-to-day experience. New installs include 60 days of full access before Community plan limits apply.
highlights: Built-in Community, Pro, and Enterprise plans, with licensing managed directly in the app
Borg 2 support across repository create, import, stats, and archive flows
A revamped dashboard, cleaner navigation, improved settings, and auto theme mode
RBAC, repository access controls, personal profiles, and API tokens for multi-user setups
Announcements, Umami analytics, and better product telemetry
Stronger SSH, restore, testing, and CI reliability
